_comment: Claude Code hooks configuration. Copy to ~/.claude/settings.json or project .claude/settings.json

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-format Python files after every write/edit

hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" && uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; fi

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-format JS/TS files after every write/edit

Stop._comment: Run tests and linter after Claude finishes a task. If tests fail, Claude will fix them.

hooks.command: npm run test 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest 2>/dev/null || echo 'No test runner found — skipping'
npm run lint 2>/dev/null || uv run ruff check . 2>/dev/null || echo 'No linter found — skipping'
